name: My Best Buy® Visa® Card
effective_cost: Free, with no annual fee on the standard tier (a $59/yr Gold tier exists for thinner-credit applicants, with a richer 6% Best Buy rate)

verdict.text: Only worth it for regular Best Buy shoppers: rewards are store-locked

earn_rates.category: Best Buy purchases (in-store & BestBuy.com): 6% for My Best Buy Elite Plus members

earn_note: This is the open-loop Visa version of Best Buy's card: it earns outside Best Buy, unlike the closed-loop, store-only My Best Buy Credit Card, which earns 5% at Best Buy but nothing anywhere else and can't be swiped elsewhere. Choosing 0% promotional financing on a purchase forfeits the reward-earning on that purchase. Best Buy periodically runs limited-time bonus categories and a 10%-back first-day offer for new cardholders; check current terms before applying.

redemption_options.method: Best Buy / BestBuy.com reward certificates, plus a published list of third-party gift cards through the My Best Buy rewards portal

points.per_100k: $1,000 in Best Buy certificates (or a lower effective value if redeemed for third-party gift cards)
points.note: Despite the open-loop Visa network letting you earn everywhere, redemption is still closed-loop: rewards come back as Best Buy certificates, not cash or a statement credit. A small third-party gift-card catalog exists but isn't a substitute for flexible cash back.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer partners: My Best Buy Rewards redeem only at Best Buy or through its fixed gift-card catalog.

insurance.detail: Not confirmed on Citi's public product page for this card
Not confirmed on Citi's public product page for this card

protection_note: Citi and Best Buy's public marketing pages for this card don't list purchase protection, extended warranty, or travel insurance. A standard (not Signature) Visa tier, and no benefits guide with those terms was found in research. Treat this as a rewards-and-financing card with no meaningful insurance suite, not a card to rely on for large or fragile purchases.
rental_note: No rental car coverage found for this card.

status_perks.name: My Best Buy Elite/Elite Plus tie-in
status_perks.note: Card spend counts toward Elite/Elite Plus status tiers in Best Buy's separate loyalty program, and Elite Plus members earn 6% instead of 5% at Best Buy on this card.

services.name: Special financing offers
services.detail: Deferred-interest and reduced-APR promotional financing on qualifying Best Buy purchases; using it forfeits reward-earning on that purchase and requires paying off the full balance before the promo period ends to avoid retroactive interest.

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: $0 on purchases made outside the US.

services.name: Gold tier available
services.detail: A $59/yr My Best Buy Visa Gold tier exists, generally offered to applicants with thinner credit files, trading the annual fee for approval odds; the standard no-fee tier is the better deal if you qualify.

additional_cards.title: Authorized users

benefits.text: Earns rewards on their spend (into your account)
No dedicated insurance to share: this card doesn't carry a confirmed protection suite

additional_cards.note: Free to add, useful mainly for pooling a household's Best Buy and gas/grocery spend toward one annual certificate pool.

timeline.text: Best Buy/Citi issue two distinct card products under similar names: the closed-loop, store-only My Best Buy Credit Card (5% at Best Buy, unusable elsewhere) and this open-loop My Best Buy Visa Card (5% at Best Buy plus 1–3% elsewhere). Confirm which one you're comparing; they are not the same card with different names.
